title: AshenOG's Cat Totem of Undying!
description: A cute little cat companion to whisk you to safety :3
body:
Introducing AshenOG's next line up in the Totem of Undying Pets series: the CAT TOTEM!!!
![picture 1 of the cat totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b538e255fd216173b596e3fff66fffdf872a6ab.png)
Ever wanted a cute pet in your hot bar that saves you from death? The cat totem of undying is calling your name! Featureing a cute, pixelated kitty, this little goober will whisk you back to safety should your life ever be in danger. 9 lives? Yup, this smol fluff ball has it all! :3
![picture 2 of the cat totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81cea221d390fe9d78999e995b678b17f9f92716.png)
[PSSST! Want a cute totem but as a wolf or a fox? click the links below to be redirected to pages of cuteness unleashed!]

Fox Totem: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashenogs-fox-totem!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashenogs-fox-totem!)
Wolf Totem: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashenogs-wolf-totem-of-undying!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashenogs-wolf-totem-of-undying!)
